notes: All uploaded JSON catalogs are present in /json and also embedded into js/onyx_conversation_brain_bundle.js for file:// use.
The browser bot uses only HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JSON, and PNG assets.
Use the Response profile dropdown to favor all catalogs, Dino Dad/Papa, Squishy Momma, or base conversation responses.
Onyx is embedded into each user HTML chatbot page; no separate Onyx HTML entry page is included in this package.
